turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'm really nervous about my upcoming job interview. I've prepared a lot, but it's still hard to shake the anxiety.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's completely normal to feel that way! Have you practiced your responses to common interview questions?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yeah, I've done some practice with my friend. But what if they ask something unexpected or tricky?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That’s a good point. Just remember to stay calm and take your time to think before answering. They’re looking for how you handle the situation, not just the right answer.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: You're right, I should focus on my process of thinking through it rather than getting too stressed about the outcome.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Exactly! And remember to breathe and stay positive. You've done your homework, so you’re well-prepared. Good luck!
